pi_items.source: Task instructions require 8 specific categories of design additions (6 styling stations, 4 retail elements, 2 washing sinks, breakroom appliance, 2 walls, 3 floor colors, 4 labels, 7 ambient decor items). The sheer volume of precise UI placements justifies an extremely_hard difficulty rating.
Task description explicit instructions and verifier.py header.
Task description explicit instructions and verifier.py header.
export_result.sh checks furniture piece names, new wall tags, floorTexture/floorColor attributes, and label text tags. verifier.py asserts counts for all four categories.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for sweet_home_3d_env boutique_hair_salon_conversion task by verifying the programmatic generation of the 'hair_salon_project.sh3d' building shell from 'SweetHome3DExample7.sh3d', and validating that all task parameters and metadata claims match the verifier and setup scripts perfectly. The task requires a generative interior design containing 6 styling stations, retail shelves, washing sinks, and distinct functional zones via partition walls and floor textures.
